name: Pill
overview: Pill unravels the deep-set rot in the Indian pharmaceutical industry. Dr. Prakash along with three whistle-blowers face a powerful pharma giant Forever Cure to expose the corrupt nexus of pharma, middlemen, and doctors through which a pill reaches the common man. Will the good be able to overcome the evil?

trailers.title: Pill | Streaming 12th July | JioCinema Premium | Subscribe at Rs. 29/month
